svg.text: QUESTION 1 — what types of AI models exist?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a classification model in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is a regression model in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is an NLP model in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is a computer vision model in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is a recommendation model in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is a reinforcement learning model in AI?')
sendPrompt('Does an AI V&V system work for all model types?')
g.text: YES — your V&V system works for ALL model types
Because it checks behaviour and quality, not the model type

svg.text: QUESTION 2 — what do you feed into the V&V system?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data do you need to provide for AI model validation?')
sendPrompt('What model details do you need to provide for AI V&V?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI V&V agent process the model and data together?')

g.text: Final V&V Report — Pass or Fail
